Other locations the gear can be found
Cornucopia Adventurer Challenge
Signor Death Cap Ring

Once in a while launches a magic orb at a random enemy unit. The orb bounces up to 3 times. The orb deals 175000 magic damage on impact. The ring wearer recovers health equal to 55% of the damage dealt by the ability. Also the targets sets on fire. Burning targets take 224000 magic damage, and their healing rate is reduced by 30% for 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

Event: Cornucopia Island May 2025

Sage bot code: RI182

First trigger: 4 sec

Cooldown: 7 secs
